seo.title: Bybit ETH/USDT Funding Rate — 5,770 Settlements Analyzed | Zirodelta
seo.description: ETH/USDT funding rate on Bybit: 11.72% annualized across 5,770 settlements (Jan 2021–Mar 2026). 82.5% positive rate frequency. Real data from 9.4M+ records.

content.intro: ETH/USDT perpetual futures on Bybit — analyzed across 5,770 funding rate settlements spanning Jan 2021 to March 2026 (5.1 years of data). Average funding rate: +0.0107% per 8-hour settlement = 11.72% annualized. 82.5% of settlements are positive (shorts collect). All numbers from Zirodelta's 9.4M+ settlement record dataset — the deepest funding rate analysis available.
content.how_funding_works: Bybit calculates funding rates at 00:00, 08:00, and 16:00 UTC using the time-weighted average premium between the perpetual price and mark price over the previous 8-hour period. The funding fee is exchanged directly between long and short position holders based on their position size. Bybit's unified trading account allows seamless margin management across positions, while the exchange's robust matching engine ensures minimal slippage during funding exchanges.
content.why_this_pair: ETH/USDT perpetual on Bybit typically exhibits moderate funding rate volatility, making it ideal for predictable arbitrage strategies. The pair's massive trading volume ensures tight spreads and minimal market impact when establishing hedge positions. Ethereum's strong institutional adoption creates consistent directional pressure that often results in sustainable funding rate imbalances.

sections.heading: Historical Data (5,770 Settlements)
sections.body: Our dataset contains 5,770 ETH/USDT settlements on Bybit over 5.1 years. Average rate: +0.0107% per 8h (11.72% annualized). 82.5% of settlements are positive — meaning a delta-neutral short position collects funding roughly 5 out of every 7 settlement periods. Range spans from the Binance funding rate floor to ceiling, capturing multiple market cycles including bull runs, corrections, and sideways periods.

sections.heading: Monthly Trends & Seasonality
sections.body: Bybit ETH funding shows similar seasonal patterns to Binance but with slightly lower rates. The 82.5% positive frequency still makes it a strong arbitrage target.

sections.heading: Cross-Exchange Comparison: ETH Across Venues
sections.body: KuCoin leads ETH at 17.66% annualized (6,334 settlements). Binance at 14.74% (6,898 settlements). Bybit at 11.72% (5,770 settlements). Hyperliquid at 16.14% with hourly settlements.

sections.heading: Delta-Neutral Strategy Application
sections.body: Buy ETH spot + short ETH perpetual = zero price exposure. Collect funding every 8 hours when positive (82.5% of the time on Bybit). Zirodelta's engine automates this with smart venue routing — if Bybit rates compress, it checks alternative exchanges for better rates. Cross-exchange routing (e.g., short perp on Bybit, buy spot on another exchange) unlocks opportunities that single-exchange strategies miss.

faq.answer: Based on 5,770 settlements from Jan 2021 to March 2026, the average is +0.0107% per 8h cycle (11.72% annualized). 82.5% of settlements are positive.

faq.question: Which exchange has the best ETH funding rate for arbitrage?
faq.answer: KuCoin leads ETH at 17.66% annualized (6,334 settlements). Binance at 14.74% (6,898 settlements). Bybit at 11.72% (5,770 settlements). Hyperliquid at 16.14% with hourly settlements.

faq.question: How reliable is ETH/USDT funding rate income on Bybit?
faq.answer: 82.5% of 5,770 settlements over 5.1 years were positive. This includes multiple bear markets, making ETH/USDT on Bybit one of the more consistent funding pairs. However, rates can turn negative during severe corrections.
